name: The Cigna Group
description: The Cigna Group is a global health service company dedicated to improving health, well-being, and peace of mind. With over 190 million customer relationships worldwide, the company offers an integrated suite of health services, including medical, dental, behavioral health, pharmacy, vision, supplemental benefits, and other related products. Through its diversified brands, Evernorth Health Services and Cigna Healthcare, The Cigna Group delivers innovative and personalized solutions to individuals, employers, and government entities.
